name: Scope Research
when_to_use: Pick which research areas matter for this opportunity at this stage; produce a research plan, not findings.

name: Investigate Area
when_to_use: Execute deep research in one area (or all in-scope areas via fan-out); produce a per-area artifact + investigation brief.

name: Synthesize Findings
when_to_use: Roll up 3+ area artifacts into one decision-ready cross-area brief.

name: Decide Go/No-Go
when_to_use: Fold investigated areas into Facts / Assumptions / Decisions / Risks; emit go / no-go / pivot with kill criteria.
